# Push Configuration

| Setting | Value |
|---------|-------|
| Remote | origin |
| Default branch | main |
| PR target | main |
| Branch strategy | trunk-based |
| CI provider | none |
| PR template | none |
| Promotion chain | feature -> main |

<!-- Generated by /gabe-push first run (2026-04-23). Edit values as needed. -->
<!-- Branch strategy: trunk-based (feature -> main) or gitflow (feature -> develop -> main) -->
<!-- CI provider: github-actions / none -->
<!-- PR template: path to template file, or "none" -->
<!-- Promotion chain: the branch flow, separated by " -> " -->
<!-- Detection: origin/main only (no origin/develop) → trunk-based. No .github/workflows/ → CI none. -->
<!-- When code scaffolds + CI wires up, set CI provider to `github-actions` and rerun /gabe-push. -->
